_meta.source_policy: PDF-derived learning content; story structure and characters are model_inference.

characters.name: Haru Mizunoe
characters.hair_style: long loose hair with small sky-blue hair clips
characters.signature_accessory: sky-blue pencil tucked into her notebook spiral
characters.uniform_description: navy blazer, blue sweater vest, white shirt, modest pleated skirt, sky-blue ribbon
characters.insecurity: afraid everyone will discover she is only keeping up by asking basic questions
characters.speech_style: plain, direct, often starts with 'Wait, what exactly are we allowed to assume?'
characters.reason_to_compete: to prove that asking simple questions can protect the team from repeating last year's mistake

characters.name: Rikka Kisaragi
characters.hair_style: high wavy ponytail with a purple scrunchie
characters.signature_accessory: thin silver hair clip shaped like a bracket
characters.uniform_description: navy blazer worn perfectly, violet vest and tie, lab badge holder
characters.personality: fast, exacting, lonely when others cannot follow her jumps
characters.insecurity: believes slowing down means losing the one thing that makes her useful
characters.speech_style: compressed and elegant; revises herself when Haru asks for the missing step
characters.reason_to_compete: to learn how to make brilliance usable by a team

characters.name: Sayo Tachibana
characters.hair_style: short bob with mint flower clip
characters.signature_accessory: mint bookmark from last year's notebook
characters.uniform_description: navy blazer, mint cardigan and ribbon, carefully kept skirt
characters.insecurity: worries she passed on pressure instead of courage
characters.speech_style: soft, image-rich, uses questions instead of orders
characters.reason_to_compete: to turn last year's unanswered question into a gift rather than a scar
characters.relationship_to_protagonist: senior who entrusts Haru with the unresolved question

characters.name: Minori Kagami
characters.hair_style: short bob with red hair clips
characters.signature_accessory: red stopwatch used for practice rounds
characters.uniform_description: navy blazer over a red hoodie, red ribbon, sleeves always neat
characters.personality: harsh but not cruel, protective through standards
characters.insecurity: terrified that being kind too early will let last year's failure repeat
characters.speech_style: clipped, judge-like, softens only after the reasoning is solid
characters.reason_to_compete: to make responsibility mean more than control
characters.relationship_to_protagonist: demanding mentor who gradually recognizes Haru
